ordering_principle: Most comprehensive (full agent graphs) → most fragmented (event-triggered scripts)

avenues.name: aalang
avenues.description: Complete .gab.jsonld orchestrators and agents — modes, actors, personas, constraints, transitions

avenues.name: aalang_markdown_integration
avenues.description: .integration.md files — human-readable summaries of AALang graphs

avenues.name: auto_memory
avenues.description: Auto-memory files — operational learnings, patterns, gotchas that persist across sessions

avenues.name: @import_references
avenues.description: .0agnostic/06_context_avenue_web/01_file_based/04_@import_references/ reference files — curated content collections for context loading

avenues.name: skills
avenues.description: SKILL.md files — specific capabilities with WHEN/WHEN NOT conditions

avenues.name: path_specific_rules
avenues.description: Rules that apply to specific paths/directories

avenues.name: hooks
avenues.description: Hook scripts triggered by tool events (pre/post commit, file changes, etc.)
